<div class="markdown"><h4>Data Science Applications to Astronomy</h4><h2>Week 9: Model Building IV:</h2><h2>Classification</h2></div>


<div class="markdown"><div class="admonition is-question"><header class="admonition-header">Question:</header><div class="admonition-body"><p>Why is 0.5 the default threshold value?</p></div></div></div>


<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/>


<div class="markdown"><p>Logistic: <bond def="plt_logistic" unique_id="ZrrdaQ4qaB9g"><input checked="" type="checkbox"/></bond> Tanh: <bond def="plt_tanh" unique_id="3b7kiNSLlzZ3"><input type="checkbox"/></bond> Erf: <bond def="plt_erf" unique_id="DqeTrmBqch5P"><input type="checkbox"/></bond> Relu: <bond def="plt_relu" unique_id="NoltZpSMuBeK"><input type="checkbox"/></bond> Leaky Relu: <bond def="plt_lrelu" unique_id="+fc9QCi0IgF6"><input type="checkbox"/></bond></p></div>


<div class="markdown"><div class="admonition is-question"><header class="admonition-header">Question:</header><div class="admonition-body"><p>What makes logistic regression a strong choice for classification tasks?</p></div></div></div>


<div class="markdown"><h2>Clustering</h2><ul><li><p>K-means clustering</p></li><li><p>Heirarchical clustering</p></li></ul></div>


<div class="markdown"><h2>What's the difference between clustering &amp; classificaiton?</h2></div>


<div class="markdown"><h3>Create simulated dataset</h3></div>

<pre class='language-julia'><code class='language-julia'>begin 
    num_pts = 200
    idx_grps = [1:50, 51:75, 76:num_pts]
    idx_centers = [-1 0; 0 1; 1 0]'
    scale_fac = 0.5
end;</code></pre>






<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/>

<pre class='language-julia'><code class='language-julia'>using Clustering, Distances, StatsPlots, Random</code></pre>


<pre class='language-julia'><code class='language-julia'>dist_matrix_ordered = pairwise(Euclidean(), pts_ordered, dims=2);</code></pre>



<div class="markdown"><h3>Compute pair-wise distances</h3></div>

<pre class='language-julia'><code class='language-julia'>heatmap(dist_matrix_ordered)</code></pre>
<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/>


<div class="markdown"><h3>Apply Heirarchical Clustering</h3></div>

<pre class='language-julia'><code class='language-julia'>hcl_ordered = hclust(dist_matrix_ordered, linkage=:average) </code></pre>
<pre class="code-output documenter-example-output" id="var-hcl_ordered">Hclust{Float64}([-137 -184; -15 -164; … ; 179 197; 194 198], [0.012531982016832014, 0.02377272320032458, 0.025366599064660753, 0.040121368605520284, 0.04012453022909578, 0.04194668925303451, 0.045837882003180085, 0.048586528196327305, 0.054476425944774726, 0.059496700160230995  …  1.4147247536895118, 1.4234009435010548, 1.5405914363510127, 1.6531777740107194, 1.6628750161671146, 1.6917249522134845, 2.0441712731255994, 2.2647765021468134, 2.6787448899787343, 2.849682151792413], [82, 150, 113, 84, 169, 103, 156, 60, 48, 43  …  16, 74, 35, 5, 14, 67, 37, 134, 27, 114], :average)</pre>

<pre class='language-julia'><code class='language-julia'>plot(hcl_ordered, xticks=:none, xlabel="Point ID", ylabel="Threshold for clustering")</code></pre>
<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/>


<div class="markdown"><h3>Scramble the order of points</h3></div>


<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/>

<pre class='language-julia'><code class='language-julia'>hcl_unordered = hclust(dist_matrix_unordered, linkage=:average, branchorder=:optimal);</code></pre>


<pre class='language-julia'><code class='language-julia'>plot(hcl_unordered)</code></pre>
<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/>


<div class="markdown"><h3>Compare results from ordered vs unordered</h3></div>

<pre class='language-julia'><code class='language-julia'>let
    plt1 = plot(hcl_ordered, xticks=:none, title="Ordered")
    plt2 = plot(hcl_unordered, xticks=:none, title="Unordered")
    plot(plt1,plt2, layout=(2,1))
end</code></pre>
<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/>


<div class="markdown"><h3>Zoom in on point labels</h3></div>


<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,"/>


<div class="markdown"><p>Limits for Dendogram: Min <bond def="min_x_dendo" unique_id="hykl6Y5GTKiZ"><input max="200" min="1" type="range" value="1"/></bond> Max <bond def="max_x_dendo" unique_id="eWK5WRwDqTXh"><input max="200" min="1" type="range" value="200"/></bond></p></div>


<div class="markdown"><h2>Neural Networks</h2></div>


<div class="markdown"><div class="admonition is-question"><header class="admonition-header">Question:</header><div class="admonition-body"><p>What is a neural network?</p></div></div></div>


<div class="markdown"><ul><li><p>A basic neural networks is just the composition of an activation of a linear functions of inputs, several or many, many times!</p></li><li><p>Lots of AI is research in desiging neural network architectures that are particularly well-suited to a common type of problem (e.g., images, video, audio, text)</p></li></ul></div>


<div class="markdown"><img alt="Diagram of small dense neural network" controls="" src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," type="image/svg+xml" width="400px"/><p>Credit: The image above is by Glosser.ca, <a href="https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/3.0/deed.en">CC BY-SA 3.0</a>, via Wikimedia Commons, original source</p></div>


<div class="markdown"><h3><a href="https://playground.tensorflow.org/#activation=tanh&amp;batchSize=10&amp;dataset=circle&amp;regDataset=reg-plane&amp;learningRate=0.03&amp;regularizationRate=0&amp;noise=0&amp;networkShape=4,2&amp;seed=0.29523&amp;showTestData=false&amp;discretize=false&amp;percTrainData=50&amp;x=true&amp;y=true&amp;xTimesY=false&amp;xSquared=false&amp;ySquared=false&amp;cosX=false&amp;sinX=false&amp;cosY=false&amp;sinY=false&amp;collectStats=false&amp;problem=classification&amp;initZero=false&amp;hideText=false">Neural Network Demo</a></h3></div>


<div class="markdown"><h1>Announcements</h1></div>


<div class="markdown"><h2>Plan for Next week</h2></div>


<div class="markdown"><h1>Notes from Monday</h1></div>


<div class="markdown"><h2>Common activation functions</h2></div>

<pre class='language-julia'><code class='language-julia'>logistic(x) = inv(1+exp(-x))</code></pre>
<pre class="code-output documenter-example-output" id="var-logistic">logistic (generic function with 1 method)</pre>

<pre class='language-julia'><code class='language-julia'>relu(x) = x &gt; zero(x) ? x : zero(x)</code></pre>
<pre class="code-output documenter-example-output" id="var-relu">relu (generic function with 1 method)</pre>

<pre class='language-julia'><code class='language-julia'>leaky_relu(x; α::Real = 1e-3) = x &gt; zero(x) ? x : α*x</code></pre>
<pre class="code-output documenter-example-output" id="var-leaky_relu">leaky_relu (generic function with 1 method)</pre>


<div class="markdown"><h1>Setup</h1></div>

Distances 0.10.12<br>
Plots 1.40.9<br>
PlutoTeachingTools 0.3.1<br>
PlutoUI 0.7.61<br>
Random 1.11.0<br>
SpecialFunctions 2.5.0<br>
StatsPlots 0.15.7
</div>
